channel.title: Memory Allocation
channel.description: How much memory is everyone running thru VB? On Kicksecure I can’t run less than 8 GB and Whonix 10 GB. With just a half dozen browser tabs open the VM will freeze with anything less than those amount. Host is Win 10.

item.title: Memory Allocation
item.dc:creator: arraybolt3
item.description:
It depends. For a VM that’s just for testing or very light usage, 4 or even 2 GB is fine. Other times I’ve allocated 8 GB or even 16 GB. It all depends on what you’re doing.

Kicksecure doesn’t cause applications to use more RAM to my awareness, so this is unspecific to Kicksecure. See:

Kicksecure – 6 Sep 24

Potential Solutions Beyond Kicksecure!

Explore resources outside of Kicksecure to address unspecific questions or issues.

Read full topic

item.title: Memory Allocation
item.dc:creator: komms
item.description:
How much memory is everyone running thru VB? On Kicksecure I can’t run less than 8 GB and Whonix 10 GB. With just a half dozen browser tabs open the VM will freeze with anything less than those amount. Host is Win 10.

Read full topic
